articles.title: Travelers deploys AI-powered claims countrywide with OpenAI
articles.summary: Travelers built an AI-powered Claim Assistant with OpenAI to guide customers through filing claims, provide 24/7 support, and scale operations during peak demand.

articles.title: Advancing youth safety and opportunity through global leadership
articles.summary: OpenAI calls for global action on youth AI safety, proposing an international institute to strengthen safeguards, standards, and opportunities for young people.

articles.title: Codex is becoming a productivity tool for everyone
articles.summary: The Next Era of Knowledge Work report explores how Codex is transforming productivity through AI-powered research, data analysis, workflow automation, and content creation.

articles.title: Our views on AI policy and political advocacy
articles.summary: Our approach to AI policy and political advocacy, transparency, support for thoughtful regulation and AI safety, and that no outside political group speaks on the company’s behalf.

articles.title: Building the infrastructure for the Intelligence Age in Michigan
articles.summary: OpenAI breaks ground on a 1GW data center project in Michigan as part of Stargate, building AI infrastructure to expand access, create jobs, and support communities.

articles.title: OpenAI frontier models and Codex are now available on AWS
articles.summary: OpenAI frontier models and Codex are now generally available on AWS, giving enterprises a new path to build with OpenAI through the AWS environments, controls, and procurement workflows they already use. Customers can get started with OpenAI on AWS and move faster from evaluation to production.
